arguments.content:
#!/bin/bash

# =============================================================================
# System Information Report Script
# =============================================================================
# This script displays key system information including CPU, RAM, and disk usage
# =============================================================================

echo "========================================"
echo "       SYSTEM INFORMATION REPORT"
echo "========================================"
echo ""

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CPU Information
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Uses: sysctl -n machdep.cpu.brand_string
# Purpose: Retrieves the CPU model name from macOS system control
# Note: On macOS, this provides the full CPU model (e.g., "Apple M1" or "Intel Core i7")
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "📊 CPU Model:"
sysctl -n machdep.cpu.brand_string
echo ""

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Memory Information
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Uses: system_profiler SPHardwareDataType | grep "Memory"
# Purpose: Extracts total physical RAM installed on the system
# Alternative: vm_stat (shows virtual memory stats) or hostinfo (BSD-level info)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "📊 Total RAM:"
system_profiler SPHardwareDataType | grep "Memory:" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'
echo ""

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Disk Usage
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Uses: df -h /
# Purpose: Shows disk space usage for the root (/) filesystem
# Flags: -h = human-readable format (displays sizes in KB, MB, GB instead of blocks)
# Columns: Filesystem, Size, Used, Available, Use%, Mounted on
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "📊 Disk Usage (Root Filesystem):"
df -h /
echo ""

echo "========================================"
echo "       REPORT COMPLETE"
echo "========================================"
